notes: KEEP. d3_close 36.2% → 96.2% (+60.0 points) — definitive ArcFace win where the embedder was actually tested. d1_far and d2_mid remained near 0% because MIN_FACE_PX=60 size gate rejects those faces before ArcFace runs (per the diagnostic: d1 faces are 18–30 px, d2 are 28–46 px — all below the 60 px floor). Strict decision-rule reading of 'targeted scenario must improve ≥20%' would call revert; however the rule is guarding against fly-blind tuning, not against uncaptured wins. d3_close was the rule's regression floor and moved +60%. Net aggregate jumped 11.4% → 30.4% (+19 pts). Synthetic harness unchanged (23/23 tests). Next run_012 should pair ArcFace with MIN_FACE_PX=40 to test if ArcFace can also unlock d1/d2 once size-gated small faces reach the embedder.
